services.title: Remote Tech Support
services.headline: Remote help for everyday computer and software problems for plan members.
services.summary: Get secure remote help for software issues, settings, printers, email, and everyday computer problems once your remote support plan is in place.

services.title: Remote Virus & Malware Removal
services.headline: Remote malware cleanup for plan members with secure access already in place.
services.summary: Clean up spyware, pop-ups, browser hijacks, and other malware remotely when secure access is already in place through your support plan.

services.title: 1-on-1 Remote Tech Training
services.headline: Beginner-friendly online training for everyday tech confidence.
services.summary: Private online training for everyday computer, phone, internet, and online-safety skills, with patient guidance for beginners, seniors, and families.

services.title: Remote Security Assessment
services.headline: Remote security review for Central Florida plan members.
services.summary: Review devices, accounts, browser settings, updates, and backups remotely to find weak points and tighten them with clear next steps.

services.title: Privacy Hardening & Digital Safety
services.headline: Remote privacy help for Central Florida plan members.
services.summary: Harden browsers, messaging apps, DNS, VPN settings, and device privacy controls through a guided remote session for enrolled plan members.

services.title: Remote IT & Cybersecurity Tutoring
services.headline: Focused one-on-one help for specific IT and cybersecurity topics.
services.summary: Live remote guidance for students, career changers, and self-taught learners who want help with a specific class, project, lab, or skill area.
